title: Senex To Matt. Prior
Cynicus To W. Shakespeare
content:

title: Thought, A
content:
If all the harm that women have done

title: School
content:
If there is a vile, pernicious,
        Wicked and degraded rule,
    Tending to debase the vicious,
        And corrupt the harmless fool;
